commands.test_subset: cargo test -p opengoose-types -p opengoose-profiles -p opengoose-persistence -p opengoose-projects
commands.test_full: cargo test --workspace (requires network for goose git dep + dbus for keyring)
commands.notes: Full workspace build requires: libxcb1-dev, libdbus-1-dev, pkg-config, network access for goose git dep. opengoose-web fails with v8 download error. sccache must be disabled (RUSTC_WRAPPER='') in sandbox.

testing_notes.note: Types went 84→92 (maintainer added plugin/metrics/yaml_store tests). Projects has context.rs + definition.rs (new files) with comprehensive tests. Persistence PR #324 (open) has 291. sccache not installed - must use RUSTC_WRAPPER='' for local builds.

completed_work.description: Task 3: 2 migration test improvements in opengoose-persistence: added api_keys to table existence test, added test_performance_indexes_exist covering 5 named indexes. PR #324 submitted (draft, open).
Task 3: 4 tests added to opengoose-profiles covering empty extension name, empty/whitespace provider_fallback goose_provider and goose_model, empty parameter key. PR #322 merged on 2026-03-15.

Task 2/5/6: Verified saturation of offline crates; no new opportunities found. Persistence now has 302+ test annotations. No relevant testing issues to comment on. test_db() duplications exist in network-dependent crates only.
Task 3: 7 tests added to opengoose-projects (3 in store.rs error paths, 4 in project.rs truncation/utility). Confirmed in main as of 2026-03-12.
completed_work.pr_note: Commits went to main directly (no PR); branch was ephemeral

completed_work.description: Task 6: Assessed persistence test infrastructure. test_db() duplicated ~7 times, ensure_session() duplicated 3 times. Low-priority code smell only.
Task 5: Commented on issue #51 (Duplicate Error Enums).
Added 2 tests to main: StreamStarted/Updated/Completed Display + empty GOOSE_RECIPE_PATH guard.
PR #52: 4 tests for YamlFileStore::list() extension filtering + WorkItemStore::set_input(). Merged 2026-03-08.

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-core SessionManager - complex cache-DB consistency logic, no tests. Blocked by goose network dep.
opengoose-teams chain/router/fan_out executors - complex orchestration logic. Maintainer added dispatch.rs (OPE-533) and matrix incoming (OPE-536) tests — good momentum.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: Offline testable crates are well-covered - 507 tests total. Focus future runs on finding opportunities in network-dependent crates or wait for new features.
